title: 12Pcs Golden Artificial Palm Leaves, Golden Faux Tropical Monstera Leaves, Realistic Palm Leaves Decor for Hawaiian Banquet Jungle Beach Party Decoration
features: Material: These decorating leaves gold are made of plastic, combining plastic and iron wire to ensure durability and stability. No matter how long it is used, it is not easy to fade and maintain its original beauty

Size: The size of each gold palm leaf is 30 × 15 × 0.2cm/11.81 × 5.9 × 0.07inch, which is a moderate size suitable for various decoration needs and can be easily integrated into different environments

Wide application: These simulated palm leaves have realistic details and a smooth surface, making them very suitable for tropical-style parties and events. They can be used to decorate Hawaiian banquets, tropical theme parties, weddings, birthday parties, etc., adding a tropical atmosphere to the occasion

Package includes: Each package contains 12 pieces of golden artificial palm leaves, which are enough to meet various decoration needs. The golden leaves and natural and realistic appearance make them very suitable for all kinds of festivals and event decorations

Practical: These realistic palm leaves can be used for vases, walls, desktops and various decorative embellishments, easily creating a Hawaiian island style atmosphere, suitable for various home and party decoration needs
description: Product name: Golden faux tropical monstera leaves Color: Gold Material: Plastic Product size: 30 × 15 × 0.2cm/11.81 × 5.9 × 0.07inch

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Interior home decor, Events and parties (weddings, birthday parties), Tropical-themed decor
